demographics.living_situation: lives with family (and a new puppy)

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: His head has huge bald patches that are completely crusted over, and today this massive, squishy lump appeared that oozes pus. He's crying constantly from the pain.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Painful crusted bald patches on my child's scalp, now with a big squishy oozing lump.

symptom_narrative.onset: patchy hair loss + scaling 3 weeks ago; crusting/itch worse over a week; boggy lump over 48h
symptom_narrative.character: bald scaly patches with broken hairs; a big boggy tender lump oozing pus
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: black dots where hairs broke off; pustules around hairs; boggy oozing lump; tender neck glands; no fever

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: recently got a new puppy; shares hats/combs at times

objective_data_offered.value: patchy bald areas with thick greyish scale and 'black dots' where hairs broke off; a big 4cm boggy, red, tender lump on top oozing pus from around the hairs; tender neck glands
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: parent/camera description; cannot palpate to confirm bogginess vs a fluctuant abscess
